narrative:
Putnam County has 23,550 registered voters, with 49.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.4 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.8% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -26.1% D−R vs -37.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
